scripts.generate:fdp-docs: cd .. && uv run fdp docs --out web/.generated/fdp-docs/raw && npm run stage:fdp-docs --prefix web
scripts.predev: npm run generate:datasets && npm run stage:fdp-docs
scripts.precheck: npm run generate:datasets && npm run stage:fdp-docs
scripts.prebuild: npm run generate:datasets && npm run stage:fdp-docs
